title: Deivam Thandha Veedu Lyrics Aval Oru Thodarkathai
stanzas: <div>Deivam Thandha Veedu Song Lyrics Aval Oru Thodarkathai

Deivam thandha veedu
veedhi irukku
indha oorenna
sondha veedenna
gyaana penne
vazhvin porulenna
nee vandha kadhai enna

naan kaettu
thaai thandhai padaitharaa!!
ilai enai kettu
en pillai pirandhaanaa!!

deivam seitha paavam idhu
podi thangachi
kondraal paavam
thindraal pochu
idhuthaan en katchi

aadhi veedu
andham kaadu
idhil naanenna
adiye nee enna
gyaana penne

verum koyil idhilenna
abishegam
un manam engum
theru kooththu
pagal vesham

kallikkenna mullil veli
podi thangachi
kaattukkedhu thottakkaaran
idhuthaan en katchi.

kondathenna koduppathenna
idhil thaai enna
manandha thaaram enna
gyaana penne

ennai thondi gyaanam
kandaen idhuthaan en katchi

unmai enna
poimai enna
idhil thaen enna
kadikkum thaezh enna
gyaana penne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Deivam Thandha Veedu reflects themes of home and familial love, conveying deep emotional sentiments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Aval Oru Thodarkathai, this song underscores the protagonist's connection to her roots and the significance of family.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song features the legendary singer K.J. Yesudhas and was composed by M.S. Viswanathan.

When was this song released?

Deivam Thandha Veedu was released in the year 1974.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Deivam Thandha Veedu from Aval Oru Thodarkathai evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection to family. It beautifully conveys the themes of love, belonging, and the sanctity of home. The heartfelt lyrics and melodious composition create a soothing atmosphere, making it a perfect choice for moments of reflection. This classic piece remains a beloved favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Deivam Thandha Veedu from Aval Oru Thodarkathai is a timeless classic that resonates with the soul. The enchanting vocals of K.J. Yesudhas combined with the heartfelt lyrics create a deeply emotional experience. This song captures the essence of nostalgia and devotion, making it a cherished piece in Tamil music history.
stanzaMeanings: Deivam Thandha Veedu Song Lyrics Aval Oru Thodarkathai
The house given by God is on the street.
The house given by God is on the street, what is this place? What story do you have, oh wise girl, about life?
I asked, did my mother and father create me? Or did they listen to me when my child was born?
This is the fate created by God, if it is a powder, it will be crushed, this is my view.
The old house is beautiful, what am I in this? You are the wise girl.
What story do you have, oh wise girl, about life?
This is just a temple, what is the worship? Your heart is a dance everywhere, in the daytime.
The thorn in the stone is crushed, the one who touches it is the one who is crushed, this is my view.
What will you give me, what will you take? In this, what is the star that my mother gave me, oh wise girl?
What story do you have, oh wise girl, about life?
If it is clear and understood, it is a blessing, if it goes without knowing, it is a curse.
The earth is crying, searching for love.
I found knowledge in my heart, this is my view.
What is truth, what is falsehood, in this what is the honey that will sting, oh wise girl?
What story do you have, oh wise girl, about life?
